mapper.insert: insert into wallet_transaction (user_id, txn_no, txn_type, biz_type, biz_id, amount, before_balance, after_balance, remark, operator_id, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{txnNo}, #{txnType}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{amount}, #{beforeBalance}, #{afterBalance}, #{remark}, #{operatorId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, user_id, txn_no, txn_type, biz_type, biz_id, amount, before_balance, after_balance, remark, operator_id, create_time from wallet_transaction where txn_type = 'BOOKING_DEBIT' and biz_type = 'BOOKING' and biz_id = #{reservationId} limit 1
select count(*) from wallet_transaction where txn_type = 'REFUND' and biz_type = 'BOOKING' and biz_id = #{reservationId}

select id, user_id, txn_no, txn_type, biz_type, biz_id, amount, before_balance, after_balance, remark, operator_id, create_time from wallet_transaction where txn_type = 'BORROW_DEPOSIT_DEBIT' and biz_type = 'BORROW' and biz_id = #{borrowId} limit 1
select count(*) from wallet_transaction where txn_type = 'REFUND' and biz_type = 'BORROW' and biz_id = #{borrowId}
